language.select: 🌐 Welcome to CyberMate Choose your interface language: 🇷🇺 Русский • 🇺🇿 O'zbekcha • 🇬🇧 English You can change it later in your personal profile.
start.welcome: 🚀 Welcome to CyberMate Choose an action from the menu below.
chat.list.title: 💬 Your chats:
chat.list.empty: No chats yet. Start a new chat.
chat.open.title: Chat with {nickname}
chat.open.empty: Chat is empty. Send the first message.
chat.start.prompt: 💬 Start a new chat Enter nickname or @username.
chat.start.not_found: User with this nickname was not found.
chat.start.self: You cannot create a chat with yourself.
chat.send.prompt: ✍️ Enter message text Send one text message.
chat.send.too_long: Message is too long. Maximum {max_len} characters.
chat.not_found: Chat not found or already deleted.
chat.notify.new_in_chat: 📩 You have a new message in chat
activity.card: 📊 Activity Choose a section to view the latest lists.
activity.section.subscriptions.title: ⭐ My subscriptions
activity.section.subscribers.title: 👥 My subscribers
activity.section.likes.title: ❤️ My likes
activity.section.liked_by.title: 💘 Who liked me
activity.section.friends.title: 🤝 Friends
activity.list.empty: The list is empty for now.
game.choose.search: 🎮 Find teammate Choose a game for search. We'll show matching profiles from other players.
profiles.status.title: 📋 My profiles
profiles.status.subtitle: Status of your game profiles:
profiles.game.not_created: 📭 No profile for {game} yet Tap the button below to create one.
profiles.create.stub: Profile creation will be added in the next step.
profiles.card.mlbb: 🎮 MLBB Player Profile 🆔 ID: {game_player_id} ⭐ Main lane: {main_lane} 🎯 Extra lanes: {extra_lanes} 📝 Description: {description} 📅 Updated: {updated_at}
profile.delete.confirm: ⚠️ Delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.
search.need_profile: ⚠️ Create profile first Search is available only after profile creation.
search.empty: 😕 Nothing found yet No profiles found for this game right now. Try again later.
search.results.title: 🔎 Found profiles: {game}
search.card.mlbb: 🎮 MLBB Player Profile 👤 Player: {player_name} 🆔 ID: {game_player_id} ⭐ Main lane: {main_lane} 🎯 Extra lanes: {extra_lanes} 📝 Description: {description} 📅 Updated: {updated_at}
profile.card: 👤 Profile 🆔 Telegram ID: {user_id} 🔗 Username: {username} 🌐 Language: {language} 📅 Registered: {registered_at} 📋 Profiles: {profiles_count}
profile.section.card: 👤 Your profile 🆔 ID: {user_id} 🔗 Username: {username} 📝 Nickname: {full_name} ❤️ Likes: {likes} 👥 Followers: {followers} ⭐ Subscriptions: {subscriptions} 🤝 Friends: {friends} 📋 Profiles: {profiles_count}
profile.section.stats: 📊 Profile stats 📋 Profiles: {profiles_count} ❤️ Likes: {likes} 👥 Followers: {followers} ⭐ Subscriptions: {subscriptions} 🤝 Friends: {friends}
profile.stats.title: 📊 Profile stats
profile.language.choose: 🌐 Change language Choose the interface language.
profile.edit.title: ✏️ Edit data Choose what you want to edit.
profile.edit.avatar.prompt: Send a new photo for your avatar.
profile.edit.avatar.invalid: Send a photo for avatar or tap "❌ Cancel".
profile.edit.full_name.too_long: Name is too long. Maximum: {max_len} characters.
profile.edit.username.readonly: Username comes from Telegram and can only be changed in Telegram settings.
settings.title: ⚙️ Settings Choose what you want to change.
settings.choose_language: 🌐 Change language Choose a new language.
stats.card: 📊 Statistics ❤️ Likes: {likes} 👥 Followers: {followers} 👀 Profile views: {views} 💞 Mutual likes: {mutual_likes}
mlbb.id.prompt: 🆔 Enter your game ID Use format: 1129099628(13762)
mlbb.image.prompt: 🖼 Send profile screenshot Please send an image of your in-game profile. It will be shown in your profile card.
mlbb.image.invalid: ❌ This is not an image Send a photo or image document.
mlbb.extra_lanes.prompt: 🎯 Which extra lanes can you play? You can choose multiple or a single “All lanes”.
mlbb.description.prompt: 📝 Tell a bit about yourself Write a short profile description: who you're looking for, playstyle, online time, etc.
mlbb.description.invalid: ❌ Description must be between {min_len} and {max_len} characters
